badge.title: Enhancing Social Media Privacy Settings
badge.description: Adjust privacy settings on social platforms, limit who can see your info and posts, and strengthen account protection.

badge.title: Phishing Awareness And Email Security
badge.description: Spot phishing red flags, verify senders, and avoid unsafe links and attachments.

badge.title: Privacy Settings on Popular Apps
badge.description: Manage app permissions, reduce data sharing, and control what apps can access.

badge.title: Detecting Spyware Infection on Devices
badge.description: Recognize spyware symptoms and run scans to remove threats and restore device safety.

badge.title: 2FA Setup And Management
badge.description: Set up two-factor authentication and backup methods to protect important accounts.

badge.title: Password Management And Security
badge.description: Create strong passwords and use a password manager to reduce account takeovers.

badge.title: Managing Digital Footprint
badge.description: Reduce personal exposure online by cleaning profiles and sharing with intention.

badge.title: Recognizing AI-Assisted Manipulation And Deepfakes
badge.description: Identify manipulated media and use quick checks to verify authenticity.

badge.title: Using VPNs for Secure Browsing
badge.description: Understand VPN protection and set up safer browsing on public networks.

badge.title: Safe Use of Public Computers and Wi-Fi
badge.description: Use public devices and Wi-Fi safely without leaking logins or personal data.

badge.title: Identifying Hidden-Surveilance Devices
badge.description: Learn practical steps to detect hidden cameras/mics and understand tool limitations.

badge.title: Safe Online Banking Practices
badge.description: Bank online safely using secure habits, strong authentication, and monitoring.

badge.title: Recognizing Malicious Mobile Apps
badge.description: Spot risky apps by permissions, reputation, and behavior before installing.

badge.title: Verifying Online Identities and Combating Catfishing
badge.description: Verify identities and catch red flags using practical cross-checking steps.

badge.title: Securing Home Wi-Fi Networks
badge.description: Harden your router settings, update firmware, and improve home network safety.
